meta.title: MailFlow - Private Business Communication Platform
meta.description: MailFlow is a private, self-hosted business communication platform. Email, file storage, and workflows - installed on your own server. You own the infrastructure. Zero Big Tech dependency.

hero.badge_tagline: Your Server. Your Data. Your Keys.
hero.headline: Client Email Becomes Work.
hero.subheadline: When an email arrives, MailFlow turns it into tasks, files, deadlines, and reports — running on infrastructure you own.
hero.subheadline_2: Clients email you normally. You execute systematically.

problems.section_intro: Email is where work starts — but SaaS email was never designed to execute work.
problems.section_subtitle: Gmail and Outlook are SaaS platforms. You rent access. They own the infrastructure, the data, and the terms. When they change pricing or policies, you have no choice but to comply.
problems.vendor_lockin_desc: Your email, contacts, and files are trapped. Migrating away means losing years of data and workflows.
problems.per_seat_desc: $6-25 per user, per month, forever. For a team of 20, that's $1,500-6,000/year — and growing.
problems.third_party_desc: Your business emails sit on their servers. Subject to their policies, their breaches, their compliance failures.
problems.sovereignty_desc: Data stored in unknown jurisdictions. You can't control where it lives or who can legally access it.

solution.section_subtitle: MailFlow installs on your VPS. You own the server and the data. No third-party access. Ever.
solution.own_keys_desc: Root access. Full control. We install it, configure it, then hand you the keys. It's yours.
solution.flat_cost_desc: Pay for your VPS once. Add unlimited users. No per-seat fees, no scaling surprises.
solution.jurisdiction_desc: Pick a VPS provider in your country. EU data stays in EU. Full GDPR control.
solution.zero_access_desc: Data never leaves your server. No cloud dependencies. No vendor reading your mail.

workflow.section_subtitle: Real client communication becomes structured work — tasks, files, deadlines, and reporting — without separate tools, manual syncing, or SaaS dependencies. Projects live where the conversation started.
workflow.caption: From email to execution — all on your server.

tracking.section_subtitle: Know when emails are opened, links clicked, and attachments downloaded. All data stored on your server.
tracking.opens_desc: Know exactly when your email was opened

multi_account.section_subtitle: Connect existing Gmail or Outlook accounts while you transition. Manage all accounts from one interface, then phase out SaaS dependencies at your own pace — or keep them connected if needed.

filters.section_subtitle: Server-side rules that work while you sleep. Auto-organize, auto-respond, auto-forward based on conditions you define.

tasks.section_subtitle: Turn any email into a task with one click. Deadlines, priorities, and status tracking — all linked to the original conversation.

analytics.section_subtitle: Understand your email patterns. Response times, peak hours, engagement rates — visibility into real communication stored on your server.

drive.section_subtitle: Private file storage on your server. Email attachments, project files, documents — organized and searchable.

infrastructure.layer_subtitle: Everything above runs on systems you own
infrastructure.server_subtitle: MailFlow runs on a VPS you control. We install the complete stack — web server, mail server, database, security. Then we hand you root access. It's your infrastructure.
infrastructure.install_desc: Full setup on your VPS. OpenLiteSpeed, Dovecot, Postfix, MariaDB — all configured and optimized.
infrastructure.keys_desc: Root access, full control. We give you the keys and step back. It's YOUR server.
infrastructure.zero_access_desc: Data never leaves your server. No cloud dependency. Complete data sovereignty.

panel.section_subtitle: DEVCON Panel is the control center for your business infrastructure. Manage email, websites, databases, DNS, SSL, security — everything your business needs, on one server you own.
panel.feature_hosting_desc: Host unlimited websites on one server

security.section_subtitle: Fail2ban, ModSecurity WAF, CPGuard malware scanner, firewalld — all configured on your server. You control the security policies. Full audit visibility.
security.fail2ban_desc: SSH, Postfix, Dovecot, LiteSpeed, FTP protection
security.modsec_desc: OWASP rules, SQL injection & XSS prevention

ai.section_subtitle: Optionally enable AI-assisted config analysis. Disabled by default. When enabled with your own API key, it reviews Postfix, Dovecot, and other configs for misconfigurations.
ai.feature_1: Disabled by default — enable only if needed
ai.feature_2: Uses your own OpenAI API key — we never see your data
ai.feature_3: Analyzes server configs for security issues

backups.section_subtitle: Built-in backup system for configs, sites, and databases. Store locally or sync to your own S3/SFTP destination. Full audit trail of every server action.
backups.config_desc: Web server, virtual hosts, PHP configs — all versioned
backups.remote_desc: Sync backups to S3, SFTP, or any remote destination
backups.audit_desc: Every action logged — who, what, when, success/failure

security_privacy.section_subtitle: Enterprise security stack, configured on your server. You manage access, you set policies, you own the audit trail.

who_for.section_subtitle: Built for businesses who want ownership, not rental agreements.

comparison.section_subtitle: What you pay over 3 years for a 20-user team
comparison.conclusion: Most teams recover the infrastructure cost within 12-18 months. After that, they operate on owned systems with near-zero marginal cost.

pricing.section_subtitle: One-time infrastructure handover. You get full ownership of your business communication platform. Optional managed oversight if you prefer hands-off maintenance.
pricing.vps_note: Typical VPS cost: €15-25/month. We recommend Hetzner, Contabo, or OVH for European hosting.

handover.step_1_desc: We discuss your requirements and choose the right VPS provider.
handover.step_2_desc: We set up and configure everything on your server.
handover.step_4_desc: We hand you the keys. It's your infrastructure now.

footer.copyright: 2026 MailFlow. Built for businesses who own their infrastructure.
